JUDGE DAVID BALLATI; RPTR SUSAN LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR CONT'G JURY TRIAL. ALL 12 JURORS PLUS 2 ALT JURORS ARE PRESENT.PLTF PRESENT BY CNSL DEGENSHEIN, DEFT DEMARCO BY CNSL ELIG, DEFTS SHINKAWA & TATSUMI BY CNSL HORNSBY. CT INSTRUCTS JURY. ALL PARTIES MAKE CLOSING ARGUMENTS.JURY DELIBERATES & RETURNS SPECIAL VERDICT: DEFTS ROSALES & SHINKAWA WERE NOT NEGLIGENT; DEFTS TATSUMI & DEMARCO WERE NEGLIGENT. NEGL OF TATSUMI & DEMARCO DID CAUSE INJURY TO PLTF; NO INJURY TO PLTF WAS CAUSED BY ROSALES & SHINKAWA. TOTAL AMT OF ECON DAMAGES IS $631.84; THERE ARE NO NON-ECONOMIC DAMAGES. THE AMT OF NEGL WAS 90% AS TO DEFT TATSUMI AND 10% AS TO DEFT DEMARCO, ZERO% AS TO DEFTS ROSALES & SHINKAWA.
